maxSlides.action: Reduce slides or update rules.json maxSlides

frameType.missing.action: Add frameType to LEVEL1-frameTypes.json and run pnpm merge-rules

scaleTooSmall.msg: Scaling factor too low – content may not fit
scaleTooSmall.action: Reduce nesting depth or content; adjust baseFont in validate.js

requiredComponentMissing.action: Add required elements (e.g., h1) to MD content

layerIncomplete.action: Add missing LEVEL2/3/4 entries for this type

deckMissing.action: Run pnpm init-project or create deck.json manually
